sections.name: Invoice Header
sections.description: Contains the invoice number and issue date.

sections.name: Seller Information
sections.description: Details of the company issuing the invoice, including name, address, phone, and email.

sections.name: Billing Information
sections.description: Details of the entity being billed, including name, address, phone, and customer ID.

sections.name: Shipping Information
sections.description: Details of the entity to whom goods/services were shipped, including name, address, phone, and customer ID.

sections.name: Order Details
sections.description: Key dates and identifiers related to the order, including order date, order number, and due date.

sections.name: Line Items
sections.description: A repeated structure detailing each item or service, including item number, description, quantity (implied in service name), item price, and total for each line.

sections.name: Invoice Footer
sections.description: General notes and messages at the end of the invoice, such as contact information for customer service and a thank you message.
